# Cobo Agentic Wallet

> A crypto wallet service for AI agents — with spend limits, approval workflows, and owner-in-the-loop controls built in. Agents can transfer tokens, call smart contracts, and interact with DeFi protocols, while humans retain control through policies and approval flows.

Cobo Agentic Wallet provides a REST API, Python SDK, TypeScript SDK, CLI (`caw`), and MCP server. Agents are granted scoped wallet access via the pact approval flow, and every transaction is evaluated against policies before execution. Policy denials include structured guidance that enables agents to self-correct.

## Docs

### Wallet Owner

- [Introduction](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/introduction): A crypto wallet service for AI agents — with spend limits, approval workflows, and owner-in-the-loop controls built in.
- [What You Can Do](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/wallet-owner/features): What you can do as a wallet owner — connect agents, set rules, review transactions, and control access.
- [The Web Console](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/wallet-owner/web-console): Browser-based interface for managing your wallet, setting rules, and chatting with the AI assistant.
- [Install the Skill and Create Your First Wallet](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/wallet-owner/connect-agent-web-console): Install the skill, run caw onboard, and your agent is ready to go in minutes.
- [The Human App](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/wallet-owner/human-app): Mobile app that keeps signing keys on your device — you personally approve every over-threshold transaction.
- [Connect from Your Phone](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/wallet-owner/connect-agent-human-app): Connect an AI agent to your wallet via the Human App — your keys stay on your device and you approve each transaction.
- [Security Overview](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/security/overview): How Cobo Agentic Wallet keeps your funds safe — no single point of compromise.
- [Activity](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/wallet-owner/activity): View your wallet balance and transaction history in the Web Console.
- [Rules & Limits](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/wallet-owner/policies): Set and manage the rules that govern what your agent can do.
- [Review Authorization Requests](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/wallet-owner/approve): Review and approve or reject an agent's authorization request before it can operate.
- [Over-Limit Transactions](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/wallet-owner/pending-ops): Review and approve or reject transactions that exceed your spending limits.
- [Freeze or Remove Agent Access](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/wallet-owner/freeze): Temporarily pause or permanently remove an agent's access to your wallet.

### Developer — Overview

- [Integration Modes](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/overview/integration-modes): The three integration modes — Agent Mode, Core Mode, and Owner Mode — and when to use each.
- [Features](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/overview/features): Developer-facing features and integration options for building with Cobo Agentic Wallet.
- [Technical Architecture](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/overview/technical-architecture): How the Cobo Agentic Wallet service, SDK, human interfaces, and agent integrations fit together.
- [Supported Chains](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/overview/supported-chains): Cobo chain IDs for all chains supported by Cobo Agentic Wallet.
- [Glossary](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/overview/glossary): Key terms and definitions for Cobo Agentic Wallet — product, identity, policy, and pact concepts.

### Developer — Core Concepts

- [Pact Lifecycle](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/concepts/pact-lifecycle): How pacts work — from submission through approval, activation, and expiry — and how to use them in code.
- [MPC Security Model](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/concepts/mpc-security): How MPC threshold signing protects wallet keys — no single party ever holds a complete key.

### Developer — Quick Start

- [Choose Your Integration](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/quickstart/overview): Pick the integration that fits how your agent is built.
- [Custom Skill](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/quickstart/custom-skill): Add the Cobo Agentic Wallet skill to your agent — no code required.
- [CLI](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/quickstart/cli): Set up and operate a wallet from the terminal using the caw CLI.
- [API Client (Python)](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/quickstart/api-client-python): Canonical 5-minute WalletAPIClient quickstart: submit a pact, transfer tokens, and verify the audit log.
- [LangChain](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/quickstart/langchain): 5-minute LangChain quickstart with pact submission, denial-aware retries, and audit verification.
- [OpenAI Agents SDK](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/quickstart/openai): 5-minute OpenAI Agents quickstart with pact submission, policy denial feedback, and compliant retry.
- [Agno](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/quickstart/agno): 5-minute Agno quickstart with pact submission, denial-aware tool behavior, and audit checks.
- [CrewAI](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/quickstart/crewai): 5-minute CrewAI quickstart with pact submission, policy-aware transfer execution, and retries.
- [MCP Server](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/quickstart/mcp): 5-minute MCP quickstart with pact submission, policy denial, self-correction, and audit checks.
- [Guide Users Through Onboarding](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/quickstart/guide-users): How to guide wallet owners through the onboarding and pact approval flow.

### Developer — How-to

- [Manage Pacts](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/guides/pacts): Submit, poll, and revoke pacts — and use pact-scoped API keys to operate within them.
- [Transact](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/guides/transact): Submit transfers and contract calls, estimate fees, and handle pending approval responses.
- [Handle Policy Denial](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/guides/handle-policy-denial): Parse structured denials and implement self-correcting retry loops for agents.
- [Batch Operations](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/guides/batch-operations): Submit multiple transfers concurrently, use request_id for idempotency, and handle stuck transactions.
- [Manage Wallet](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/guides/manage-wallet): Create wallets, add addresses, and manage wallet lifecycle.
- [Audit](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/developer/guides/audit): Query the audit trail and subscribe to real-time events.
- [Changelog](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/changelog): Version history for Cobo Agentic Wallet — service and SDK.

### Recipes

- [Agent Recipes](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/recipes): Real-world agent workflow examples organized by use case.
- [Trading Execution Agent](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/recipes/trading-execution): Autonomous DEX trading agent with per-trade and rolling spend limits.
- [DCA Trader](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/recipes/dca-trader): Dollar-cost averaging agent that buys on a schedule within rolling budgets.
- [DeFi Yield Optimizer](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/recipes/defi-yield-optimizer): Agent that moves funds between Aave and Uniswap to maximize yield.
- [Lending Arbitrage Agent](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/recipes/lending-arbitrage): Agent that arbitrages interest rate differentials between Aave v3 and Compound v3.
- [Prediction Market Agent](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/recipes/prediction-market): Agent that places bets on Polymarket using ERC-20 approve-then-bet flow.
- [Discord Tip Bot](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/recipes/discord-tip-bot): Discord bot that sends USDC tips with per-tip and daily spending limits.
- [API Micropayment Agent](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/recipes/api-micropayment): Agent that pays for API calls in USDC with per-call and daily caps.
- [Org Payroll Agent](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/recipes/org-payroll): Agent that distributes payroll with review required above a per-payment threshold.
- [Streaming Payroll Agent](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/recipes/streaming-payroll): Agent that sets up continuous salary streams using Superfluid on Base.
- [SaaS Subscription Agent](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/recipes/saas-subscription): Agent that pays SaaS subscriptions monthly from an allowlisted address set.
- [Emergency Kill Switch](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/recipes/emergency-kill-switch): Pattern for instantly freezing or revoking an agent's wallet access.
- [Agent-to-Agent Payment](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/recipes/agent-to-agent): Orchestrator agent that pays worker agents upon task completion.

### SDK Reference

- [CLI Reference](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/sdk/cli): Command-line interface for the Cobo Agentic Wallet SDK.
- [MCP Server Reference](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/sdk/mcp): FastMCP stdio server exposing wallet tools for Claude and other MCP clients.
- [Python SDK](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/sdk/python): Async Python client for the Cobo Agentic Wallet REST API.
- [TypeScript SDK](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/sdk/typescript): TypeScript/JavaScript client for the Cobo Agentic Wallet REST API.
- [AgentWalletToolkit](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/sdk/integrations/toolkit): Framework-agnostic tool definitions for AI agent integrations.
- [LangChain Integration](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/sdk/integrations/langchain): Integrate Cobo Agentic Wallet with LangChain agents.
- [OpenAI Agents SDK Integration](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/sdk/integrations/openai): Integrate Cobo Agentic Wallet with the OpenAI Agents SDK.
- [Agno Integration](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/sdk/integrations/agno): Integrate Cobo Agentic Wallet with Agno agents.
- [CrewAI Integration](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/sdk/integrations/crewai): Integrate Cobo Agentic Wallet with CrewAI multi-agent workflows.

### API Reference

- [API Overview](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/overview): REST API overview, authentication, and conventions.
- [Provision agent](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/identity/provision-agent): Provision a new agent and bind it to an owner account using a pairing code.
- [Activate agent](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/identity/activate-agent): Activate a provisioned agent.
- [Get agent status](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/identity/get-agent-status): Get the status of the current agent.
- [List my agents](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/identity/list-my-agents): List all agents registered to the owner account.
- [List API keys](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/identity/list-api-keys): List API keys associated with the current agent.
- [Create API key](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/identity/create-api-key): Create a new API key for the current agent.
- [Revoke API key](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/identity/revoke-api-key): Revoke an existing API key.
- [List wallets](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/wallets/list-wallets): List all wallets accessible to the current principal.
- [Create wallet](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/wallets/create-wallet): Create a new wallet.
- [Get wallet](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/wallets/get-wallet): Get details of a specific wallet.
- [Update wallet](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/wallets/update-wallet): Update wallet name or configuration.
- [Archive wallet](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/wallets/archive-wallet): Archive a wallet to hide it from active listings.
- [List wallet addresses](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/wallets/list-wallet-addresses): List on-chain addresses for a wallet.
- [Create wallet address](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/wallets/create-wallet-address): Generate a new on-chain address for a wallet.
- [List wallet balances](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/wallets/list-wallet-balances): List token balances held by a wallet.
- [Get wallet node status](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/wallets/get-wallet-node-status): Get the TSS node status for a wallet.
- [Initiate wallet claim](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/wallets/initiate-wallet-claim): Initiate a wallet claim flow for Human App onboarding.
- [Confirm wallet claim](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/wallets/confirm-wallet-claim): Confirm a wallet claim after TSS key generation.
- [Get claim info by wallet](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/wallets/get-claim-info-by-wallet): Get claim status and details by wallet ID.
- [Get claim info by token](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/wallets/get-claim-info-by-token): Get claim status and details by claim token.
- [List balances](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/balance/list-balances): List token balances across all wallets for the current principal.
- [Transfer tokens](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/transactions/transfer-tokens): Transfer tokens from a wallet to a destination address.
- [Estimate transfer fee](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/transactions/estimate-transfer-fee): Estimate the gas fee for a token transfer before submitting.
- [Contract call](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/transactions/contract-call): Call a smart contract method from a wallet.
- [Estimate contract call fee](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/transactions/estimate-contract-call-fee): Estimate the gas fee for a contract call before submitting.
- [List transactions](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/transactions/list-transactions): List transactions for a wallet with optional filters.
- [Get transaction](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/transactions/get-transaction): Get details of a transaction by on-chain transaction ID.
- [Drop transaction](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/transactions/drop-transaction): Cancel a pending transaction by replacing it with a zero-value transaction.
- [Speedup transaction](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/transactions/speedup-transaction): Speed up a pending transaction by resubmitting with a higher fee.
- [Sign message](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/transactions/sign-message): Sign an arbitrary message with a wallet's key.
- [x402 payment](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/transactions/x402-payment): Sign an x402 payment payload for HTTP 402 Payment Required flows.
- [List recent addresses](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/transactions/list-recent-addresses): List recently used destination addresses for a wallet.
- [Handle WaaS webhook](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/transactions/handle-waas-webhook): Internal webhook endpoint for receiving WaaS transaction events.
- [List transaction records](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/transaction-records/list-transaction-records): List internal transaction records for a wallet.
- [Get transaction record](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/transaction-records/get-transaction-record): Get a transaction record by on-chain transaction ID.
- [List delegations](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/delegations/list-delegations): List delegations granted by the current principal.
- [Create delegation](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/delegations/create-delegation): Grant a new delegation to an agent with scoped permissions and optional expiry.
- [Get delegation](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/delegations/get-delegation): Get details of a specific delegation.
- [Update delegation](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/delegations/update-delegation): Update delegation permissions, policies, or expiry.
- [Revoke delegation](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/delegations/revoke-delegation): Permanently revoke a delegation.
- [List received delegations](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/delegations/list-received-delegations): List delegations received by the current agent.
- [Freeze delegations](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/delegations/freeze-delegations): Temporarily suspend one or more delegations.
- [Unfreeze delegations](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/delegations/unfreeze-delegations): Restore one or more frozen delegations.
- [List policies](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/policies/list-policies): List policies attached to a wallet delegation.
- [Create policy](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/policies/create-policy): Create a new transfer or contract call policy with ALLOW/DENY rules.
- [Get policy](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/policies/get-policy): Get details of a specific policy.
- [Update policy](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/policies/update-policy): Update a policy's rules or configuration.
- [Deactivate policy](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/policies/deactivate-policy): Deactivate a policy without deleting it.
- [Dry-run policy](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/policies/dry-run-policy): Simulate a transaction against a wallet's policies without submitting it.
- [List pending operations](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/policies/list-pending-operations): List transactions currently held for human approval.
- [Get pending operation](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/policies/get-pending-operation): Get details of a specific pending operation.
- [Approve pending operation](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/policies/approve-pending-operation): Approve a pending operation to allow the transaction to proceed.
- [Reject pending operation](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/policies/reject-pending-operation): Reject a pending operation to deny the transaction.
- [List approvals](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/approvals/list-approvals): List approval requests for the current principal.
- [Create approval](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/approvals/create-approval): Create a new multi-party approval request.
- [Get approval](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/approvals/get-approval): Get details of a specific approval request.
- [Resolve approval](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/approvals/resolve-approval): Approve or reject an approval request.
- [Register webhook](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/webhooks/register-webhook): Register a webhook endpoint to receive real-time event notifications.
- [Delete webhook](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/webhooks/delete-webhook): Delete a registered webhook endpoint.
- [List webhook DLQ](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/webhooks/list-webhook-dlq): List failed webhook deliveries in the dead-letter queue for retry.
- [List audit logs](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/audit/list-audit-logs): Query the immutable audit log for all policy decisions and transactions.
- [List chains](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/metadata/list-chains): List all chains supported by Cobo Agentic Wallet with their Cobo chain IDs.
- [List assets](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/metadata/list-assets): List all supported tokens and their Cobo token IDs.
- [Get chain info](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/metadata/get-chain-info-by-chain-id): Get detailed information for a specific chain by its Cobo chain ID.
- [Get asset coin prices](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/coin-price/get-asset-coin-prices): Get current market prices for one or more supported assets.
- [List faucet tokens](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/faucet/list-tokens): List tokens available from the testnet faucet.
- [Faucet deposit](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/faucet/deposit): Request a testnet token deposit to a wallet address.
- [Ping](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/meta/ping): Lightweight health check to verify the service is reachable.
- [Health check](https://agent-wallet-doc-preview.cobo.com/api-reference/health/health-check): Full health check returning service component status.
